datasets.name: UCSF Post-op Glioma
datasets.primary_use: MedIA/NMI external post-operative glioma segmentation robustness

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Run full-volume external segmentation/domain-shift audit with patient-level split and endpoint-composition sensitivity.
recommendation.PRO_NBE_next_experiment: No immediate PRO/NBE RTDOSE experiment supported by local file inventory.
reviewer_relevant_caveats: Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.
Large ZIP inventory only; extraction/conversion required before voxel-level experiments.

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Run full-volume external segmentation/domain-shift audit with patient-level split and endpoint-composition sensitivity.
recommendation.PRO_NBE_next_experiment: No immediate PRO/NBE RTDOSE experiment supported by local file inventory.
reviewer_relevant_caveats: Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.

datasets.name: UPENN GBM NIfTI
datasets.primary_use: MedIA/NMI pseudo-label sensitivity only; not primary external validation

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Run pseudo-label sensitivity/domain-shift audit only; keep out of headline validation claims.

reviewer_relevant_caveats: Mask inventory appears dominated by automated/pseudo labels.
Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.

datasets.name: Yale Brain Mets Longitudinal
datasets.primary_use: domain-shift imaging audit; no lesion labels found in local metadata

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Use for imaging-only domain-shift and acquisition-heterogeneity audit; cannot compute Dice/lesion coverage without labels.
recommendation.PRO_NBE_next_experiment: No immediate PRO/NBE RTDOSE experiment supported by local file inventory.
reviewer_relevant_caveats: Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.

datasets.name: LUMIERE

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Run pseudo-label sensitivity/domain-shift audit only; keep out of headline validation claims.
recommendation.PRO_NBE_next_experiment: No immediate PRO/NBE RTDOSE experiment supported by local file inventory.
reviewer_relevant_caveats: Mask inventory appears dominated by automated/pseudo labels.
Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.

datasets.name: PROTEAS Brain Mets RT
datasets.primary_use: PRO/NBE independent SRS RTDOSE stress test and fractionation audit

recommendation.medIA_NMI_next_experiment: Use as cross-disease radiotherapy imaging stress test; do not present as primary glioma external validation.
recommendation.PRO_NBE_next_experiment: Run independent RTDOSE parser, prescription/fractionation strata, and BED/EQD2 sensitivity checks.
reviewer_relevant_caveats: Brain-metastasis cohort; useful stress test, not a same-disease glioma validation set.
Longitudinal structure detected; split by patient to avoid leakage.
Large ZIP inventory only; extraction/conversion required before voxel-level experiments.

high_value_experiment_queue.experiment: Run full-volume external segmentation/domain-shift audit with patient-level split and endpoint-composition sensitivity.
high_value_experiment_queue.why_it_matters: Directly addresses reviewer concern that cropped-cache MONAI/nnU-Net evidence is not enough for anatomical full-volume generalisation.
high_value_experiment_queue.local_prerequisites: NIfTI files and mask-like labels present locally.

high_value_experiment_queue.experiment: Run independent RTDOSE parser, prescription/fractionation strata, and BED/EQD2 sensitivity checks.
high_value_experiment_queue.why_it_matters: An independent RTDOSE-backed audit is the cleanest way to reduce the practical-radiation-oncology reviewer concern that the current evidence is single-cohort or proxy-heavy.
high_value_experiment_queue.local_prerequisites: Dose-like radiotherapy files present locally; extract/parse before statistical claims.

high_value_experiment_queue.experiment: Claim-status ledger refresh after every additional experiment.
high_value_experiment_queue.why_it_matters: Prevents empirical, simulated, pseudo-label, and future-work claims from bleeding into one another.
high_value_experiment_queue.local_prerequisites: Use existing source-data ledger plus v91 audit outputs.
